subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-07-18
subcodes.first_line: God, addressing one of the great Prophets of the past, says: 'Dost thou find thou art able to guide a blind man
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power of prayer, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @stories; anecdotes, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @degrees of faith; certitude
